headline: Bank of America Lifts Hewlett Packard Enterprise (HPE) Target, Sees Upside from Agentic AI Shift
summary: Hewlett Packard Enterprise Company (NYSE:HPE) is included among the 10 Innovative Dividend Stocks to Buy Right Now. headline: Seagate Is Sold Out Through 2027 As AI Reshapes Hard Drive Demand
summary: Seagate (NASDAQ: STX) is sold out. Management confirmed that nearline capacity is almost fully allocated through calendar 2027, a level of forward visibility that is rare for a hardware company. AI infrastructure buildout has consumed supply faster than the industry can respond, and Seagate's Mozaic HAMR (Heat-Assisted Magnetic Recording) technology is the primary reason hyperscalers are locking in multi-year contracts. headline: Trust3 AI and Dell Technologies Partner to Deliver Secure, Governed AI-Ready Data Lakehouse Infrastructure
summary: Trust3 AI, the industry leader in unified agentic governance (formerly Privacera), today announced an expanded strategic collaboration with Dell Technologies to provide enterprises with a secure, governed, and artificial intelligence-ready data lakehouse infrastructure. This joint solution integrates the Trust3 AI unified governance platform directly into the Dell Data Lakehouse architecture, enabling organizations to scale analytics and autonomous AI workloads across hybrid and on-premises envi

headline: Apple to Report First Earnings Since CEO Announcement. Memory Headwinds Are a Top Focus.
summary: A new CEO, memory cost issues, and artificial intelligence progress: Apple shareholders will be looking for clarity on these topics when the iPhone maker reports second-quarter earnings after Thursday’s market close.  Such results would mark an increase from the year-ago period, when Apple reported earnings per share of $1.65 and $95.4 billion in revenue.  Apple will post results after announcing last week that CEO Tim Cook will be stepping down on Sept. 1.
